/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/fapi_to_mac_indications_fastpath_translator_test.dir/fapi_to_mac_indications_fastpath_translator_test.cpp.o -o fapi_to_mac_indications_fastpath_translator_test  ../../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../../lib/fapi_adaptor/mac/p7/libocudu_fapi_to_mac_p7_fastpath_translator.a ../../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a pdu_translators/libocudu_mac_translator_helpers.a -lgtest -lgtest_main ../../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
